flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Louisiana State University-Eunice rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.5k → $14.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Louisiana State University-Eunice fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Louisiana State University-Eunice rose 44% between 2006 and 2009 (5.6% → 8.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Louisiana State University-Eunice rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5k → 2.8k).
